headline: Jim Cramer Just Called Caterpillar a Buy on Oil, Infrastructure, and AI Data-Center Power Demand
summary: Jim Cramer just put a buy stamp on Caterpillar, and the most interesting reason is electrons, not bulldozers. On the May 11 episode of Mad Money, a caller named Michael asked Cramer about Caterpillar’s upside, and Cramer rattled off three converging tailwinds. The freshest one: AI hyperscalers buying industrial-scale engines to power their data centers ... Jim Cramer Just Called Caterpillar a Buy on Oil, Infrastructure, and AI Data-Center Power Demand
